lore.english:
Taimanin. A substitute teacher of Gosha Academy. She teaches field training classes when she's not on missions and she trains her student for real battles in the classes. She respects every student as a Taimanin even if they are trainees and trains them thoroughly day and night.

She is a powerful Lightning artist, more than Mizuki Yukikaze. She is called 'Volt Taimanin' because it looks as if she glows with electricity as it flows through her body when she uses Lightning Art.

Her Lightning Art can be applied to many situations such as conjuring a lightning blade, or a shield out of electrons in the air to protect herself from enemy attacks. She is usually assigned to annihilation or raid missions in which she has gained absolute trust from the higher-ups, including Asagi, for her accomplishments on those missions.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Volt Sword[-]
skills.description:
Uses both swords to attack the enemy 2 times.
Every [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack] inflicts [&ElecShock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:320102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:320102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Uses both swords to attack the enemy 2 times.
Every [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack] inflicts [&ElecShock] at a [R:320102]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:320102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Volt Rush[-]
skills.description:
Spins around and slashes [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] with blades attached to the back 5 times.
If the target is inflicted with [&ElecShock], additionally inflicts them with [&Stun] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:320202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:320202] turn(s)
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], if the target is inflicted with [&Stun], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:320203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:320203]%[-] chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lightning Art: Chain Volt[-]
skills.description:
Overcharges both swords with electricity and slashes at the enemy.
Removes [V3:320302] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemy [&Buff]s and inflicts [&ElecShock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:320304]%[-] chance on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:320304] turn(s)
